'''''Old Republic''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] fleet that fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

In the aftermath of the battle, the ''Old Republic'' was destroyed in an encounter with an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Patrol ship/Legends|system patrol craft]] (believed to be the ''[[Daggerblade]]''). Although it was more heavily armed, ''Old Republic'' was unable to consistently hit the Imperial ship. Its drive was disabled, and the ''Old Republic'' could do nothing but stand by while the Imperial ship destroyed the sensor drones the Alliance had placed on the edges of the [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] system. The ''Old Republic'' exploded with its entire crew onboard, just as its reinforcements arrived.
